commands.review_summary:
The branch adds Azure Dynamic Sessions endpoint provenance, calls the shared native credential-destination guard before client token acquisition, adds regression tests, and updates CHANGELOG.md.

Reproducibility: yes. I did not run an end-to-end exploit, but source inspection on current main shows repository config can set azureDynamicSessions.endpoint, the shared guard has no Azure Dynamic Sessions case, and the client obtains env/Azure CLI bearer tokens for that endpoint.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review is needed for security/compatibility signoff and contributor-supplied real behavior proof; there is no narrow automated repair to queue from this review.
